channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-22
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress recently, with notable updates in the scienceverse/metacheck and marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing projects. The scienceverse/metacheck project has integrated JAPS with jamovi on the `data_check` branch, enhancing its functionality. Meanwhile, the marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing project has released version 0.4.1, with Anka building the site and Alex O. Holcombe making textual adjustments, including improvements to wording and italicizing testimonials for emphasis, on the `master` branch. These updates demonstrate the connections between our projects, with a focus on improving research tools and user experience. As our community continues to grow and collaborate, we celebrate the progress made and look forward to seeing the impact of these updates on the broader research landscape. With these advancements, we are one step closer to creating a more seamless and efficient research ecosystem.

20 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub8 commits
tenzing7 commits
metacheck5 commits

item.title: oddpub: 1 commit today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was updated with a commit that modified the ontogenerator, specifically focusing on a "code validation update". The ontogenerator's code validation was updated, as indicated by the commit message "ontogenerator: code validation update". No other branches were worked on according to the provided commits. There were no additions of new features or modules mentioned in the commit message. The commit message does not specify what exactly was changed in the code validation, only that an update occurred. No other work was done on any other branches, as only one commit is listed.

1 commit(s) today:

  • ceb9a9d [main] code validation update — ontogenerator
  • e1ca58e [main] Updated Zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 441d354 [main] README touchup — ontogenerator
  • 998a877 [main] Increment version number to 7.3.0 — ontogenerator
  • 95643d5 [main] zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 7c98de1 [main] Documentation update, keyword cleanup — ontogenerator
  • febed59 [main] documentation update — ontogenerator
  • 2b600f3 [main] improved reuse and upon request, references detection — ontogenerator
  • 52e8aeb [main] no_new_code statements — ontogenerator
  • f2850fe [main] debugging open data detection db 2023-2024 — ontogenerator

View all commits →
